steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes India as the country of origin for the Cheruku rasamu mango. The second sentence provides a 2018 production figure. The relationship is location: the production statistic applies to the same place just named — India.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs a transition that anchors the production statistic to the location already mentioned.
  • Choice A — 'Hence,': signals a logical consequence, implying the production figure follows causally from the mango's origin, which it does not. ✗
  • Choice B — 'There,': functions as a locative adverb pointing back to India, specifying where the 2018 production figure applies. ✓
  • Choice C — 'In fact,': signals emphasis or a surprising clarification; the production statistic is not being used to correct or intensify the prior claim. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Specifically,': signals narrowing to a particular aspect of the prior claim; the production figure does not narrow the origin claim — it reports output from that location. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
